category_sources: Official Juniper documentation describes libslax as an open-source SLAX implementation built on libxml2/libxslt/libexslt.
source_facts.description: Implementation of the SLAX language (an XSLT alternative).
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official Juniper/libslax repository.
docs_sources: Official Juniper documentation links to the libslax SLAX manual.
source_facts.homepage is the official Juniper/libslax GitHub wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Juniper documentation describes SLAX and the libslax distribution.
source_facts.description identifies SLAX as an XSLT alternative.
